violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice voluntarily disposed of. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage bins and bakers rack ) have an accumulation of food residue and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the food and beverage storage shelves area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2023
